revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Distinguish|Template:Year by continent category}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{Year in continent category/core
    | year = {{{year|{{Title year}}}}} <!-- allow year param for demonstration purposes -->
    | continent={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d in |replace=|count=1|plain=false}}
    | nocat={{{nocat|}}}
    | min={{{min|}}}
}}</includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}<!--
Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here!
--></noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Distinguish|Template:Year by continent category}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{Year in continent category/core
    | year = {{{year|{{Title year}}}}} <!-- allow year param for demonstration purposes -->
    | continent={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d in |replace=|count=1|plain=false}}
    | nocat={{{nocat|}}}
    | min={{{min|}}}
}}</includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded
-->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}<!--
Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here!
--></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Distinguish|Template:Year by continent category}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{Year in continent category/core
    | year = {{{year|{{Title year}}}}} <!-- allow year param for demonstration purposes -->
    | continent={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d in |replace=|count=1|plain=false}}
    | nocat={{{nocat|}}}
    | min={{{min|}}}
}}</includeonly><!--
 # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded

--></noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Distinguish|Template:Year by continent category}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{Year in continent category/core | year = {{{year|{{Title year}}}}} <!-- allow year param for demonstration purposes --> | continent={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d in |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | nocat={{{nocat|}}} | min={{{min|}}} }}</includeonly><!-- # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Distinguish|Template:Year by continent category}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{Year in continent category/core | year = {{{year|{{Title year}}}}} <!-- allow year param for demonstration purposes --> | continent={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d in |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | nocat={{{nocat|}}} | min={{{min|}}} }}</includeonly><!-- # Note {{CatAutoTOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Distinguish|Template:Year by continent category}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{Year in continent category/core
    | year = {{{year|{{Title year}}}}} 
    | continent={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d in |replace=|count=1|plain=false}}
    | nocat={{{nocat|}}}
    | min={{{min|}}}
}}</includeonly>{{CatAutoTOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
